news.headline: Travel + Leisure Co. CFO Mike Hug set to retire in 2025, according to announcement from company.
news.summary: Travel + Leisure Co. has disclosed that their CFO, Mike Hug, is set to retire in the year 2025. This announcement was made in Orlando, Florida, by the company.

news.headline: NYSE introduces daily pre-market update and weekly recap on Dec 20, 2024. Stay updated with market insights and more.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) announced the launch of a daily pre-market update and additional content from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can now access the NYSE Pre-market update and a Weekly Recap for market insights. Stay informed with the latest information directly from the iconic NYSE Trading Floor. This initiative aims to provide valuable market information to investors.

news.headline: Watercrest Santa Rosa Beach hosts festive holiday celebration to benefit Wreaths Across America.
news.summary: In Vero Beach, Florida, on December 20, 2024, the residents and staff at Watercrest Santa Rosa Beach Assisted Living and Memory Care came together for a holiday event supporting Wreaths Across America. The festive celebration showcased a spirit of giving, with a focus on giving back to the community.

news.headline: Skyharbour completes private placement, raising C$10M in funds.
Cryptocurrency market sees $1.4B liquidations as Bitcoin falls. Ethereum down 16%, XRP 18%, Dogecoin 26%.
news.summary: Other cryptocurrencies have also experienced significant declines. Ethereum saw a decrease of 16% within 24 hours, while XRP plummeted by 18% and Dogecoin by 26%. These fluctuations underscore the volatility within the altcoin market in recent trading sessions.

news.headline: The First of Long Island Corp (Nasdaq: FLIC) declares $.21/share dividend, payable Jan 9, 2025 to Dec 31, 2024 shareholders.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Melville, New York, The First of Long Island Corporation (Nasdaq: FLIC) disclosed a cash dividend of $.21 per share for the fourth quarter. Shareholders as of December 31, 2024, will receive this dividend on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Intermedia's success with service providers in 2024 leads to growth and innovation in 2025 by offering AI-powered solutions for legacy migrations, branding services, and customer relationships.
news.summary: Intermedia offers advanced AI-driven communication solutions to Service Providers, aiding in the quick transition from outdated systems and allowing partners to customize services under their own brand and retain control of customer relationships. This helps to address the evolving communication requirements of businesses in the ever-changing landscape.

news.headline: Scope Technologies Corp. partners with Percepture for growth of QSE brand, utilizing full-service digital marketing and PR agency.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 20, 2024, Scope Technologies Corp. (CSE: SCPE) (OTCQB: SCPCF) (FSE: VN8) has disclosed their collaboration with Percepture, a prominent full-service digital marketing and public relations agency. This strategic partnership aims to enhance the Company's marketing efforts and public image.

news.headline: Bluenote secures $10M from Lux Capital & Elad Gil to enhance life sciences workflows with AI, aiming to expedite healthcare solutions.
news.summary: Bluenote aims to expedite the delivery of essential medical supplies to patients and healthcare providers by optimizing regulatory processes. Recently, in San Francisco on December 20, 2024, Bluenote disclosed receiving $10 million in funding for its innovative AI technology platform designed for...

news.headline: Forpak Automation introduces LayerPak, a new food manufacturing solution to optimize stacking efficiency in production.
news.summary: In Minnetonka, Minnesota, on December 20, 2024, Forpak Automation revealed the introduction of its newest food manufacturing innovation, LayerPak. This cutting-edge solution is designed to enhance the efficiency of processing food items that require stacking or paper insertion. The unveiling signals Forpak Automation's commitment to advancing production processes in the food industry.

news.headline: VIP Play, Inc. (VIPZ) obtains access to West Virginia market for sports betting and online casino, launching app in early 2025.
news.summary: VIP Play, Inc. (VIPZ) has finalized a deal with Delaware North to gain market access to West Virginia for Sports Betting and Online Casino activities. The agreement was made official on December 20, 2024, in SARASOTA, Florida. VIP Play, Inc. is a well-established mobile gambling operator and this move opens up new opportunities in the state. This partnership marks a significant milestone for VIPZ as they continue to expand their presence in the industry.

news.headline: Financial analysts are once again making unreliable forecasts, impacting market stability.
Steel Solutions acquires operating assets of Colvin Steel, a Las Vegas-based subcontractor, expanding in Nevada.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 20, 2024, Steel Solutions, a prominent steel fabrication and erecting firm, revealed the purchase of Colvin Steel's operational assets, a well-established steel subcontractor located in Las Vegas. The acquisition process was completed earlier this month after being sealed with a final...

news.headline: Experts recommend reframing financial resolutions to set up goals for success, emphasizing mindset shift.
news.summary: According to experts in psychology and personal finance, individuals should not lose hope in improving their situation. Instead, it is crucial to change the perspective on the matter to make progress.

news.headline: AAP appoints Michael Beland as Sr. VP, Chief Accounting Officer effective Jan. 5, 2025. He will oversee accounting, tax, and financial reporting.
news.summary: Raleigh, NC - Advance Auto Parts, Inc. revealed the appointment of Michael Beland as senior vice president, controller, and chief accounting officer, commencing January 5, 2025. Beland, joining the leading automotive aftermarket parts provider in North America, will handle various crucial areas including enterprise-wide accounting operations, tax, external financial reporting, and compliance. The company, listed under NYSE as AAP, caters to professional installers and DIY customers, playing a key role in the automotive sector.

news.headline: Cyngn announced $20.0 million follow-on offering priced at the market for their AI-powered autonomous driving software.
news.summary: A company named Cyngn Inc., based in Menlo Park, California, disclosed on December 20, 2024, that it has priced a follow-on offering at the market. Cyngn is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CYN and specializes in AI-driven autonomous driving software for industrial use. The offering was executed at a gross amount that has not been specified in the available information.

news.headline: Clairyon rebrands from Healcisio, aims for rapid growth, Brenda Schmidt new CEO, Michael McCurdy CMO.
news.summary: In San Diego on December 20, 2024, Brenda Schmidt was announced as the Co-founder and CEO, while Michael McCurdy was appointed as the Chief Medical Officer of Clairyon, previously known as Healcisio, Inc. The new name showcases the company's shift towards a period of rapid expansion and commercial development. This significant development marks an important step...

news.headline: DeepIntent's HealthFirst Vaccine Audiences recognized by PM360 as one of 2024's most interesting innovations.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, PM360, a prominent trade publication for marketing executives in the pharmaceutical, biotech, medical device, and diagnostics sectors, featured DeepIntent's HealthFirst Vaccine Audiences in its yearly Innovations Issue. This edition showcases the top trends and innovations in the industry.

news.headline: BillionToOne's UNITY NIPT test improves maternity care in remote areas, reducing travel burdens for high-risk pregnancies.
news.summary: A precision diagnostics company, BillionToOne, is making strides in improving maternal care in remote communities by expanding access to the UNITY Prenatal Test. The test, launched on Dec. 20, 2024, in Menlo Park, California, aims to reduce travel burdens for high-risk pregnancies. This initiative is crucial in areas where access to specialized medical facilities is limited. The UNITY Prenatal Test offers advanced screening for pregnant women, improving the chances of early detection and effective management of potential complications. By bringing this technology to remote regions, BillionToOne is helping to enhance maternal healthcare outcomes and support high-risk pregnancies. This expansion signifies a significant step towards addressing the challenges faced by pregnant women, with the potential to positively impact a large number of individuals in underserved areas.

news.headline: Fed's Hammack: I would prefer to see more progress on prices before cutting.
Bybit Card holiday giveaway offers rewards to users from Dec. 20, 2024, to Jan. 31, 2025. Bybit is the world's second-largest crypto exchange.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on December 20, 2024, Bybit, ranked as the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, announced an extension of holiday celebrations through generous virtual gifts for Bybit Card holders. Between December 20, 2024, and January 31, 2025, users can enjoy perks with each use of their Bybit Card.

news.headline: Ontario Teachers' invests in Omega Healthcare with Goldman Sachs. Partnership aims to accelerate growth journey.
news.summary: In a recent development, Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan has announced a new joint ownership agreement with Omega Healthcare Management Services. This partnership, established on December 20, 2024, aims to fuel Omega's growth trajectory by providing vital investment support. Ontario Teachers' has decided to invest in Omega, a notable company in the healthcare management sector, and now holds a significant stake in the business. This collaboration will likely bring about substantial opportunities for Omega, leveraging the strengths of both entities. The partnership is indicative of larger industry trends and showcases the potential for Omega's accelerated growth with the backing of Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan.

news.headline: Brother International Corporation wins 5 2025 Pick Awards for 5 printer models. Keypoint Intelligence honored them.
news.summary: Brother International Corporation proudly announces the recognition of several of its printer models by Keypoint Intelligence. The Brother HL-L5215DW, HL-L6415 Series, HL-EX415DW, MFC-L5715DW, and MFC-L8395CDW have been acknowledged by the market research firm. This recognition was revealed on December 20, 2024, in Bridgewater, New Jersey.

news.headline: Zillow reveals 2024's unique home search trends, including barns and laser tag. AI-powered searches offered insights into popular choices.
news.summary: In 2024, Zillow® utilized AI-powered natural language search to uncover distinctive home-search trends, showcasing the diverse preferences of Americans. This innovative approach unveiled intriguing insights, demonstrating the varied interests of individuals seeking homes. The data highlighted a wide range of interests, from barn conversions to properties featuring laser tag facilities. This analysis offers a glimpse into the evolving needs and desires of homebuyers, shedding light on the dynamic real estate market. The information disclosed by Zillow®’s natural language search provides valuable indicators of the evolving housing market landscape.

news.headline: WOW! expands fiber internet services to Hernando Beach, FL, offering simplified pricing. NYSE: WOW gains new customers.
news.summary: Hernando Beach residents and businesses have the opportunity to subscribe to WOW!'s new all-fiber services featuring straightforward pricing. As of December 20, 2024, WOW! Internet, TV & Phone, a prominent broadband company traded on the NYSE under the symbol "WOW," disclosed the availability of its advanced all-fiber services in the area.

news.headline: SS&C GlobeOp Forward Redemption Indicator for December 2024: 3.54%, up from 2.91% the previous month.
news.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. revealed that the SS&C GlobeOp Forward Redemption Indicator for December 2024 has recorded an increase to 3.54%, compared to the previous 2.91%. This information was released on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: Gluware wins Network World's Best of Enterprise Network (BENNY) award for Intelligent Network Automation.
news.summary: Gluware, a prominent leader in intelligent network automation, has recently been acknowledged for its platform capabilities, ongoing innovation, and proven success for customers. The company, based in Sacramento, California, made this announcement on December 20, 2024. Gluware's recognition underscores its commitment to advancement in the field, with a focus on providing effective solutions to its customers.

news.headline: AORN appoints David Wyatt as new CEO and Executive Director, effective Feb. 10. Wyatt has multiple professional titles.
news.summary: The Association of periOperative Registered Nurses (AORN) has officially appointed David Wyatt, PhD, RN, NEA-BC, CNOR, FAORN, FAAN, to serve as its incoming Chief Executive Officer and Executive Director starting on February 10, 2024. Wyatt will be taking over the position from the retiring CEO. This new leadership change is anticipated to bring fresh insights and perspectives to the organization.

news.headline: EpiCypher thrives in 2024 with 7 publications, 550+ product citations, influencing chromatin research and drug development.
news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, EpiCypher is commemorating a significant year in 2024, having achieved seven peer-reviewed publications and received over 550 product citations. These milestones highlight EpiCypher's substantial influence on chromatin research and drug development, underscoring the company's steadfast commitment to advancing scientific knowledge in these areas.

news.headline: United Imaging Intelligence showcased at RSNA 2024, leaving a significant impact with advanced medical AI technologies.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 20, 2024, the RSNA 2024 event came to a close, during which United Imaging Intelligence (UII), a division of United Imaging Group focused on medical artificial intelligence, left a lasting impact with an innovative display that harmonized perfectly with the theme of the event - "Building Intelligent...".

news.headline: The UAE became a top global crypto hub in 2024 with new stablecoin rules, tax breaks, and marketing regulations.
news.summary: In 2024, the UAE solidified its position as a key player in the global cryptocurrency arena. Significant changes occurred in the country, including the implementation of new regulations for stablecoins, tax exemptions for crypto-related activities, and the introduction of stricter guidelines for cryptocurrency marketing. These developments underscored the UAE's commitment to fostering a supportive environment for cryptocurrencies, further positioning the country as a leading hub for digital assets on the global stage.

news.headline: National PACE Association provides signs to look for when visiting aging relatives over holidays, aiding in their safe living.
news.summary: During the holiday season, visits with elderly family members can serve as a chance to ensure their safety while living independently in the community. In Alexandria, Virginia on December 20, 2024, it was noted that these visits can prompt individuals to consider if their aging parents require additional support. This reflection often arises as a significant number of adults, especially those over 65, face challenges with daily activities. Family gatherings during the holidays can shed light on the need for assistance or adjustments in their living arrangements to ensure their well-being.

news.headline: 75% of builders offer incentives as 10% report buyers re-entering market post-election. Pending Sales Index at 2-year high.
news.summary: The Pending Sales Index has reached the peak of a two-year high according to the recent New Home Market Update from Newport Beach, California on December 20, 2024. The report revealed that 10% of builders noted a resurgence in consumer activity after the presidential election. The November 2024 report highlighted...

news.headline: Compass Mining plans to expand with 25MW Bitcoin facility in Texas, energizing over 50MW across six states by 2024.
news.summary: Heading into 2024, Compass Mining has successfully launched over 50 megawatts of energy capacity across six states. By January 2025, the company aims to have an additional 35 megawatts activated. Based in Wilmington, Delaware, Compass Mining specializes in offering top-notch Bitcoin mining hardware, hosting, and operational services.

news.headline: Toshiba TV Z670 enhances Christmas experience with exceptional visual and audio capabilities, creating lasting memories.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 20, 2024, Toshiba TV is encouraging families to embrace the festive season with the Toshiba TV Z670, a device designed to help create unforgettable memories. This television model offers outstanding visual and audio features, making it an ideal companion for the holiday season.

news.headline: FS introduces PicOS® data center switches in 10G to 800G range, with AmpCon™-DC platform, for various applications.
news.summary: A technology company based in New Castle, Delaware, is now providing a range of data center switches with speeds ranging from 10G to 800G. These switches come equipped with unified software and an AmpCon™-DC platform, making them suitable for a wide variety of applications from small data centers to High-Performance Computing (HPC) environments.

news.headline: Sei Labs unveils "Giga" roadmap aiming for 5 gigagas per second, 50x faster than competitors.
news.summary: In New York, Sei Labs, the leading developer behind Sei, the quickest Layer 1 EVM blockchain, revealed its newest roadmap called “Giga”, outlining its journey to become the most high-performing blockchain in the Web3 ecosystem. Sei aims to pioneer by being the first blockchain to reach Web2-level efficiency as it progresses towards achieving 5 gigagas per second, setting a new industry standard. This milestone of 5 gigagas per second translates to execution speeds that are 50 times faster than any other existing mainnet chain, bringing it on par with Web2 performance levels.

news.headline: Swoop recognized for three innovations in healthcare marketing by PM360.
news.summary: A company based in New York, Swoop, has been recognized in PM360's 13th Annual Innovations Issue for making significant advancements in the healthcare marketing industry. Swoop has been awarded for three groundbreaking contributions in this sector.

news.headline: Akash Network Token AKT now available on Sweden's Spotlight Stock Market via Valour Inc ETP, first entry into regulated equity markets.
news.summary: A technology company called Overclock Labs, known for developing the decentralized computing marketplace Akash Network, has recently made an announcement in Austin, Texas. They have disclosed that investors can now access Akash’s AKT token via an Exchange-Traded Product (ETP) on the Spotlight Stock Market in Sweden. This listing, facilitated by Valour Inc., represents a significant achievement as it serves as Akash Network’s inaugural foray into regulated equity markets. The Valour Akash SEK ETP provides investors with the opportunity to engage with AKT through a secure and regulated investment avenue that closely monitors the token's performance. This move highlights the growing presence of Akash Network in traditional financial markets.

news.headline: Insurtech bolttech secures over $100M in Series C funding led by Dragon Fund for global expansion.
news.summary: Singapore-based company bolttech has unveiled its Series C funding round surpassing US$100 million, aimed at bolstering its international expansion plans.

news.headline: WooCommerce partners with Affirm, making it default payment option. Affirm to offer pay-over-time plans to merchants.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made in San Francisco, WooCommerce, an open-source ecommerce platform on WordPress, revealed its partnership with Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM) as the primary pay-over-time service provider. This collaboration strengthens their existing ten-year relationship and designates Affirm as the default payment choice for vendors utilizing WooPayments. Through WooCommerce's integrated payment system WooPayments, vendors will soon have the option to seamlessly provide Affirm's tailored pay-over-time schemes to their customers, enhancing flexibility in payment methods.

news.headline: Weave survey finds 1,000 U.S. consumers rely on the internet for healthcare decisions, highlighting generational differences.
news.summary: In Lehi, Utah, a recent survey conducted for Weave (NYSE: WEAV) highlights the significant reliance of patients from various age groups on online resources for health information, impacting their engagements with healthcare professionals. This study, involving 1,000 consumers in the U.S., showcases the increasing influence of the internet on individuals’ healthcare decisions. Key insights from the survey indicate that Millennials are the most active in self-diagnosing symptoms and utilizing digital platforms to assist in their healthcare choices. This underscores the evolving role of online sources in shaping the healthcare experiences of patients across different generations.

news.headline: Fed's Hammack: Inflation is elevated and progress to 2% is uneven.
Fed's Hammack: Balance of risks is skewed toward higher inflation risks.
North Bay Resources receives 42 tons of gold ore at Bishop Gold Mill, California, totaling 62 tons. Head grade: 0.91 oz/ton. More shipments expected.
news.summary: North Bay Resources Inc. announced yesterday that 42 tons of gold ore from its Fran Gold Project in British Columbia arrived at its Bishop Gold Mill in California. This shipment, combined with a previous one in September, brings the total stockpiles of gold ore to 62 tons. The most recent independently reported head grade is 0.91 ounces per ton gold. An additional shipment of 21 tons is expected to arrive today, with more shipments scheduled for the future.

news.headline: Monopar Therapeutics Inc. prices $40 million public offering of common stock and pre-funded warrants. 798,655 shares and 882,761 warrants involved.
news.summary: Monopar Therapeutics Inc., a biotechnology company, revealed the pricing of 798,655 shares of common stock at $23.79 per share in a registered offering. Additionally, a private placement of pre-funded warrants for 882,761 shares at $23.789 per warrant was announced. The offerings are expected to generate $40 million in gross proceeds for Monopar, excluding expenses. The closing of the offerings is anticipated around December 23, 2024.

news.headline: Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) will announce Q4 2024 financial results on Jan 22, 2025, with a conference call at 8:00 a.m. Eastern.
news.summary: Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on the morning of January 22, 2025. A conference call to review these results and the company's future prospects will take place at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern Time). Interested individuals can access the call via webcast on www.textron.com or through direct dialing at (800) 343-1703 in the U.S. or (785) 424-1226 internationally; using Access Code: 84015. Furthermore, a recording of the call will be available for playback.

news.headline: Bakersfield Renewable Fuels Facility produces 250,000 gallons of renewable diesel daily, marking a major step for Global Clean Energy Holdings.
news.summary: Global Clean Energy Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB:GCEH) based in Los Angeles disclosed that their Bakersfield Renewable Fuels Facility has commenced commercial operations. The facility, known for being a prominent camelina producer and renewable fuels innovator, is generating an estimated 250,000 gallons of renewable diesel per day. This development signifies a crucial achievement for the company as it embarks on supplying eco-friendly, economical, and low-carbon fuel to consumers. The Facility utilizes patented technology that is highly expandable.

news.headline: Fed's Hammack: A strong job market allows the Fed to focus on lowering inflation.
Fed's Hammack: Dissented because data supported holding the Fed policy steady.
